subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! O ye manifestations of divine favors and bounties of the Most Glorious Beauty! That luminous Orb shone forth from the horizon of sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی ای مظاهر الطاف و عنایات جمال ابهی آن نیر نورانی از افق تنزیه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
